resource.title: Task 8: Memory Objects — Camera, Quest, UI, Misc (Batch 4)
resource.prompt:
IMPORTANT: The following types already exist in this repo on main — import them, do NOT redefine them:
- crate::errors::{Result, WizWalkerError}
- crate::types::{XYZ, Orient, Color, Keycode}
- crate::memory::memory_object::{MemoryObject, MemoryReader, DynamicMemoryObject}
Context7 is available if needed for crate docs. Proceed using windows-rs, tokio, thiserror, bitflags as needed.
Port remaining memory objects from Python to Rust.

Source files (all from https://github.com/LaurenzLikeThat/wizwalker/blob/development/wizwalker/memory/memory_objects/):
camera_controller.py, cam_view.py, gamebryo_camera.py, gamebryo_presenter.py,
quest_client_manager.py, quest_data.py, quest_position.py, goal_data.py,
window.py, render_context.py, scene_manager.py, teleport_helper.py,
conditionals.py, madlib_arg.py, madlib_block.py,
fish.py, fish_template.py, fishing_manager.py, client_tag_list.py

Each maps to a .rs file in wizwalker/src/memory/objects/. Same MemoryObject wrapper pattern.
Preserve ALL offset values exactly. Create/update objects/mod.rs to re-export everything.
Run cargo check before submitting the PR.

outcome.title: Task 8: Memory Objects — Camera, Quest, UI, Misc (Batch 4)
